text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. It involves teaching machines to read, interpret, and even generate text. For example, translation tools use NLP to convert sentences from one language to another accurately. Another common use is sentiment analysis, where computers analyze text, like social media posts, to determine whether the emotion is positive, negative, or neutral. Many modern chatbots also rely on NLP to understand user questions and provide helpful responses. As a result, NLP is making communication between humans and computers more natural every day.
